{{External|rs=Recipe for Disaster: Freeing the Lumbridge Sage}}
{{Has quick guide}}
{{Otheruses|def=no|the main quest guide|Recipe for Disaster}}
{{Infobox Quest
|name = Freeing the Lumbridge Guide
|number = 100.5
|image = [[File:Recipe for Disaster.png|300px]]
|release = [[15 March]] [[2006]]
|update = Hundredth Quest - Recipe for Disaster!
|members = Yes
|series = None
|developer = James B (framework)
}}
== Details ==
<onlyinclude> <!-- <onlyinclude> and <includeonly> are being used to support formatting on the main Recipe for Disaster page. Please do not remove -->
<includeonly>

==Freeing the Lumbridge Guide==
===Details===
</includeonly>
{{Quest details
|start = Inspect the [[Lumbridge Guide]].
|difficulty = Special
|description = You need a [[cake of guidance]] to protect the Lumbridge Guide. Wizard Traiborn in the Wizards' Tower can teach you how to make one.
|length = Short
|requirements = *{{SCP|Cooking|40|link=yes}} {{Boostable|yes}} {{Questreqstart|yes}}
*Completion of the following quests:
**[[Big Chompy Bird Hunting]]
**[[Biohazard]]
***[[Plague City]]
**[[Demon Slayer]]
**[[Murder Mystery]]
**[[Nature Spirit]]
***[[Priest in Peril]]
***[[The Restless Ghost]]
**[[Recipe for Disaster/Another Cook's Quest]]
***[[Cook's Assistant]]
**[[Witch's House]]
|items = *A [[bucket of milk]]
*An [[egg]]
*A [[pot of flour]]
*A [[cake tin]]
(All required items can be bought from the [[Culinaromancer's Chest]])

'''Recommended:'''
*[[Minigame Teleport]] to [[Guardians of the Rift]]
*[[Necklace of passage]] or access to [[fairy rings]] ({{Fairycode|DIS}}) and a [[Lunar staff|Lunar]]/[[Dramen staff]] (for quick transportation to [[Wizards' Tower]])
|leagueRegion = <poem>
Not completable, as it requires access to Misthalin.
</poem>
}}

===Walkthrough===
----
'''Inspect the frozen Lumbridge Guide in the Lumbridge Castle dining room to start the quest'''. Grab the required items from the [[Culinaromancer's Chest]] if you don't have them yet, then talk to Wizard [[Wizard Traiborn|Traiborn]]. He can be found in his room, by going up one flight of stairs in the [[Wizards' Tower]]. (Code: {{Fairycode|dis}})

====Egg====
[[File:Wizard Traiborn chathead.png|left]]
[[File:Recipe for Disaster egg quiz.png|thumb|220px|The egg quiz.]]
You must pass a short quiz to get your [[egg]] enchanted. You will be shown an [[Non-player character|NPC]] that you've seen in one of the required [[quests]], then will be asked who it is. Answer correctly three times to get the [[Enchanted egg|egg enchanted]].

''Some'' of the people:

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center"
|-
|[[File:? ? ? ? (Reldo).png|100px]]
|[[File:? ? ? ? (Velorina).png|100px]]
|[[File:? ? ? ? (Ali Morrisane).png|100px]]
|[[File:? ? ? ? (Islwyn).png|60px]]
|-
![[Reldo]]
![[Velorina]]
![[Ali Morrisane]]
![[Islwyn]]
|-
|[[File:? ? ? ? (Unferth).png|100px]]
|[[File:? ? ? ? (Gertrude).png|100px]]
|[[File:? ? ? ? (Hetty).png|100px]]
|[[File:? ? ? ? (Pirate Pete).png|100px]]
|-
![[Unferth]]
![[Gertrude]]
![[Hetty]]
![[Pirate Pete]]
|-
|
|[[File:? ? ? ? (King Lathas).png|100px]]
|[[File:? ? ? ? (Professor Gronigen).png|60px]]
|
|-
!
![[King Lathas]]
![[Observatory professor|Professor Gronigen]]
!
|}

====Milk====
You will be asked a general question about ''[[Old School RuneScape]]''. Answer three correctly to get it enchanted.

''Some'' of the questions:
*Combat level of Goblins near Lumbridge - 2
*What is the defence level requirement to wear a Mystic Hat? - 20
*Glass vial is to 33 as a glass orb is to - 46
*A gold ring is to 5 as a holy symbol is to - 16
*How much GP does it take to bribe a guard at the toll gate to Al Kharid prior to earning their trust? - 10
*I can hear howling in one direction and buzzing in the other—where am I? - Catherby
*If I'm going to need glass, first I will need - Sand, bucket, soda ash, glassblowing pipe
*I'm in a bar west of Pollnivneach. Where am I? - Bandit Camp
*Take the number of fire runes required to cast Fire Strike, and multiply by the number of air runes used to cast Wind Strike before adding the number of earth runes used to cast Earth Wave. What do you get? - 10
*The River Salve runs from - North to south
*What doesn't lie between Morytania and Asgarnia? - Keep Le Faye
*What Ingredients are used in a cake? - Flour, eggs, milk
*Which tower is closest to the Crafting Guild - Dark Wizards' Tower
*What is the nearest guild to the Fishing Platform (as the seagull flies)? - Legends'

====Flour====
You must pass a memory test. You will be shown 3 groups of ten items out of a total of 5 groups, then must answer a question about them. Answer three correctly to get [[enchanted flour]]. When answering the questions, don't use the ESC key to close the interface as it will reset that portion of the test.

''Some'' of the questions:

*Which item began with the letter 'm'? - [[Mind talisman|Mind Talisman]]
*Which of the following items were NOT shown to you? - [[Trout]]
*How many weapons were you shown? - Three ([[Maple longbow|Maple Longbow]], [[Magic shortbow|Magic Shortbow]] and [[Black longsword|Black Longsword]])
*How many types of rune were there? - Two ([[Fire rune|Fire Rune]] and [[Chaos rune|Chaos Rune]])
*Which items were amongst those you were shown? - [[Book of balance]] (noted as Guthix Prayer Book,) [[Magic logs|Magic Logs]], [[Pike]]

''Some'' of the possible item groups:
<gallery>
Recipe_for_Disaster_-_Memory_Test_Group_1.png
Recipe_for_Disaster_-_Memory_Test_Group_2.png
Recipe_for_Disaster_-_Memory_Test_Group_3.png
Recipe_for_Disaster_-_Memory_Test_Group_4.png
Recipe_for_Disaster_-_Memory_Test_Group_5.png
</gallery>

Use any ingredient on the [[cake tin]] to automatically prepare the cake for baking. Cook the tin on the range in Lumbridge castle to create the cake, and give it to the frozen guide.

===Rewards===
----
{{Quest rewards
|name = Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Lumbridge Sage
|image = [[File:Recipe for Disaster (Freeing the Lumbridge Guide) reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 1
|rewards = 
*{{SCP|Cooking|2,500}} [[Cooking]] experience
*{{SCP|Magic|2,500}} [[Magic]] experience
*Further access to the [[Culinaromancer's Chest]]
}}</onlyinclude>

==Transcript==
{{hastranscript|quest}}

{{Freeing the Lumbridge Guide}}
{{Recipe for Disaster}}
